vision_describe.note: Ran new eval-9 (non-template) + 2 regression spot-checks. Previous 8 evals unchanged from iteration-3.

prompt_strategy_change.before: Fixed image-type → template-prompt mapping table (6 types)
prompt_strategy_change.after: Guidelines: agent crafts prompt based on user intent + 4 reference examples
prompt_strategy_change.rationale: Fixed templates cannot cover all request types (e.g., 'what colors are used'). Agent already understands user intent and can construct appropriate prompts autonomously.

eval_non_template_request.prompt: 这张图里用了哪些颜色？每种颜色分别标注了什么内容？
eval_non_template_request.result: Agent crafted a color-focused prompt autonomously. Correctly identified 7 colors with their labeled content. PASS 4/4.

iteration_4.change: replaced template table with intent-based guidelines
